# NYC Permit Path

> Track and compare NYC DOB building permit and DCWP business license approval times across neighborhoods, with predictive timeline estimates for small business launches.

NYC Permit Path helps small business owners scout neighborhoods and plan launch dates by surfacing live wait-time data from NYC Open Data (DOB NOW and DCWP License Applications).

## Pages

- [Explorer](/): Interactive choropleth map of NYC ZIP codes ranked by permit wait times, with optional business-type license overlays.
- [Timeline Estimator](/predictor): Pick permits and licenses for a target ZIP, get an estimated approval date and the deadline to file by.
- [Borough Benchmarks](/benchmarks): Borough-level friction index comparing typical DOB permit and DCWP license wait times.
- [Neighborhood Benchmarks](/neighborhoods): ZIP-by-ZIP breakdown within a selected borough for a chosen permit type.
